name: Nockfall Company
specialty: A seasoned and skilled fire-wielding team, specializing in combat and fire-related rifts, known for their ability to manipulate and control flames with precision.

members.name: Thoren Ashwhisper
members.note: Scarred face, reminding everyone of the day he lost his crew during a failed mission.

members.name: Elysia Blazeheart
members.note: A former member of the Argent Blades, seeking redemption for past mistakes.

members.name: Grim Nockfall
members.note: Known for his massive warhammer, adorned with the skull of a fallen foe.

visual: They wear their Wardens of Ash emblem on their left shoulder, cloaked in dark robes stitched with the glow of embers. Their eyes are perpetually weary, but a fierce determination lingers on their faces.
reputation_note: Rumored to have survived a rift that swallowed an entire team, they are both feared and respected among the Undercity's denizens.
